full_text:
Lu Xu
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Lu Xuwas born in Youfufeng. Served in several commandries. Joined in Wang Yun’s plot and so was executed on Li Jue’s victory. Lu Xu was affiliated with the Han Dynasty. Lu Xu lived during the Later Han Dynasty periods of Chinese history.
